message:
feat(demo_showcase): add max_width cap + new test suites for bubbles/huh

demo_showcase max_width support:
- New --max-width CLI flag (env: DEMO_MAX_WIDTH) caps layout width to
  prevent unusable layouts on very wide terminals (recommended: 120-200)
- AppConfig, Config, and App all thread max_width through; WindowSizeMsg
  handler clamps width to min(terminal_width, max_width) when set
- test_support Config gains max_width: None default for consistency

New test files:
- bubbles/tests/bubbletea_integration.rs (323 lines): integration tests
  for the bubbletea runtime covering model lifecycle and message passing
- huh/tests/property_tests.rs (300 lines): property-based tests for the
  huh form/prompt library validating input constraints

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -67,6 +67,10 @@ pub struct Config {
     /// Whether to use alternate screen mode.
     pub alt_screen: bool,
 
+    /// Maximum render width in columns.
+    /// If Some, caps the layout width regardless of terminal size.
+    pub max_width: Option<u16>,
+
     // ========================================================================
     // Data Settings
     // ========================================================================
@@ -106,6 +110,7 @@ impl Default for Config {
             animations: AnimationMode::Enabled,
             mouse: false, // Disabled by default for safety
             alt_screen: true,
+            max_width: None,
             seed: None,
             files_root: None,
             self_check: false,
@@ -161,6 +166,7 @@ impl Config {
             animations,
             mouse: !cli.no_mouse,
             alt_screen: !cli.no_alt_screen,
+            max_width: cli.max_width,
             seed: cli.seed,
             files_root: cli.files_root.clone(),
             self_check: cli.self_check,

@@ -1545,6 +1545,7 @@ impl Config {
             animations: AnimationMode::Disabled,
             mouse: true,
             alt_screen: false,
+            max_width: None,
             seed: Some(42),
             files_root: None,
             self_check: false,
